title.en: The god of the Sumeru realm is here.

content.en:
"A lot of high-level realm gods!"

Ye Tian looked around and found that the lowest cultivation level were all high-level realm gods who had condensed eight eternal realm spirits, and most of them were high-level peak realm gods.

Although Taihao Tianchao Palace has no specific requirements for the cultivation of high-level realm gods, if the strength is too weak, some of the most basic dangers cannot be avoided, even if you can't encounter extradimensional creatures, there is a high probability that you can't explore a little distance and will fall due to various accidents.

Therefore, there is no need for a high-level realm god who is too weak to come, otherwise he will be sent to death.

For many top-notch forces, sending a few high-level realm gods had little impact, and it was all with the consent of these high-level realm gods.

Obviously, these high-level realm gods all want to enter that Death Void Treasure Land to fight, and if they get a great opportunity treasure, they will make a lot of money, and they may even have the hope of impacting the peak realm god realm.

It didn't take long for a large number of high-level realm gods to gather here, all of them high-level realm gods from top forces.

Soon.

The god of the Sumeru realm is here.

"I've seen the gods of the Sumeru realm!"

Many high-level realm gods said respectfully.

Seeing that the high-level realm gods were almost here, the Sumeru Realm God said, "Everyone, come with me, I will take you out of the realm of the realm and go to the Void of Death." "

Ye Tian was extremely looking forward to it, he wanted to know how the gods of the Sumeru Realm would lead them into the Void of Death.

Wow!!!

A group of high-level realm gods followed the Sumeru realm gods and shuttled, crossing one territory after another, and finally came to a place.

"This is the Heavenly Rift!"

A high-level realm god recognized it.

Heavenly Rift Valley, it is rumored that there is a boundary gap here, but it is occupied by supreme forces, and the top forces naturally dare not covet it.

But I never expected that this was the entrance to the Void of Death.

Rumble!!!!!

One opened, and many high-level realm gods entered the place.

Soon, they noticed that there were quite a few high-level realm gods stationed here, even peak realm gods.

"Don't be nervous, the people stationed here are the realm gods of our Taihao Heavenly Palace. "

The god of the Sumeru realm said.

In the blink of an eye, they were in the depths of the Heavenly Rift.

Here, a thirty-meter-long crack appeared.

Such a crack is undoubtedly an incomparably tiny crack for the gods of the realm, and the bodies of many gods of the realm are far beyond the length of this crack, but the gods of the realm can shrink infinitely, and the length is not a problem.

At this time, the Sumeru Realm God introduced: "If you want to enter the Void of Death, it is very difficult to force it out, even the peak realm gods of our supreme power can't do it. However, there were still a few weak points in the Realm of the Realm and the Death Void, and even small cracks like this. Without intervention, the crack will heal quickly. And we, Taihao Tianchao Palace, paid a huge price, which suppressed this crack and formed a passage. Basically, every supreme force has a passage, and this is the passage for our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace to enter the Death Void. Of course, you will be allowed to go in this time, and you will not want to come back in the future. "

"Understood!"

Many high-level realm gods responded to the Dao.

......

"It turned out to be through these rifts to leave the Void of Death!"

Ye Tian understood.

But in the future, it will be impossible to get out of here.

It seems that he must take the opportunity to find an opportunity to copy one or several more copy bodies, and leave these copy bodies in the Death Void, which is equivalent to completely remaining in the Death Void.

The only flaw is that you can't bring back the resources, and you can't use those resources to cultivate your relatives and the human race, so you have to find a passage to enter and exit at will.

"Come in with me!"

Sumeru realm Shinto.

In an instant, a group of high-level realm gods followed the Sumeru realm gods into the Death Void, and this was also the first time they had entered the Death Void.

Death Void. []

A group of high-level realm gods entered here.

This is a dead void, and the aura of death is incomparably strong, countless times more terrifying than the Eternal Realm Death Zone.

The bodies of these high-level realm gods were entangled in the aura of death, and their faces changed drastically one by one.

They actually felt that their high-level realm god bodies were being corroded by the breath of the Death Void, although the degree of corrosion was not very fast, but it was still corroding!

If they stay for a long time, they will all fall and die!

Suddenly.

An ancient sailing ship emerges, across the void of death.

"Guys, come up!"

This voice came from the mouth of the god of the Sumeru realm.

Many high-level realm gods immediately entered this sailboat, and only then did they not feel the aura erosion of the death void.

"'What kind of treasure is this?'

Some shallow high-level realm gods stared at the sailboat curiously and asked.

The god of the Sumeru realm introduced: "This is the super secret treasure - the boundless sailing ship, which was once an incomparably broken small sailing ship, which I accidentally found in the Void of Death. It used to be almost unusable, and I used countless treasures to incorporate it, so that it could exert a certain power, at least it could roam freely in the Void of Death, and it was relatively fast. Without it, not only would you be corrupted by the Void of Death, but it would be incredibly slow, too slow for you to believe! "

Immediately, a high-level realm god stepped out of the boundless sailboat, and then cast the Eternal Realm Spirit Technique to move.

As a result, the speed was extremely slow, and it was even far less than the speed of the Eternal Dao Realm.

As a result, this high-level realm god immediately returned.

subsequently

The god of the Sumeru realm said again: "Everyone, after the boundless sailboat is opened (Qian Zhao), don't leave, even if you sense that there is a treasure in the distance, don't go out." The Death Void is full of dangers, and the Peak Realm Gods can fall at any time. Our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace has a relatively safe route in the Death Void, and we will follow this route. If I don't follow this route, even I could be killed. "

As soon as they heard what the Sumeru Realm God said so seriously, many high-level realm gods immediately nodded, indicating that they would be very honest.

Then, the Boundless Sail began to sail through the Void of Death, but not in a straight line, but in a winding route.

It didn't take long.

Far away, a ray of light shone on the void of death, and a majestic pagoda stood in it, as if it were a supreme treasure.

Seeing this, many high-level realm gods were excited.

"It's a treasure, could it be a super secret treasure?"

They would love to go over.
